title: Quick saag paneer/tofu

but needs 5min extra for frying paneer first","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tex_formula","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"formula":"\\frac{1}{2}","guid":"F7DB50E163DA11EE81E30A58A9FEAC02","id":0}},"1":{"type":"tex_formula","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"formula":"\\frac{1}{2}","guid":"","id":0}},"2":{"type":"tex_formula","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"formula":"\\frac{1}{2}","guid":"772CF0BE63D911EE81E30A58A9FEAC02","id":0}},"3":{"type":"tex_formula","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"formula":"\\frac{1}{2}","guid":"92C997A663D911EE81E30A58A9FEAC02","id":0}}}}
steps: Mince the spinach in a food processor. Do not overprocess into a puree.
Fry garlic and ginger for 00:01:00 or less
Raise the heat to medium and add coriander, cumin, onion powder, salt, pepper.
Add cubed tofu and cook another 2-3 minutes until the water is absorbed
Add whipping cream. Turn off the heat and mix.
creator: Lenny Teytelman
